TextView.android:text: Basque style burnt cheesecake, creamy and rich.
Looks like you haven't added anything to your cart yet. Time to refuel.
Welcome to York Cafe! Let's check out our today's specials below!
Steeped for 24 hours. Infused with nitrogen. Served straight up. No apologies.

> root/payments/process.exe
> fatal error: insufficient funds or network timeout.
> the connection was severed.
> please check your pocket lint and try again.
